arts.ttl: Real Madrid sharpshooter Kylian Mbappe matches Cristiano Ronaldo total and is now chasing down all-time Los Blancos record
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe equals Cristiano Ronaldo's 33-goal haul from his debut season at Real Madrid with a brace in his team's 3-2 success over Leganes at Bernabeu.

arts.ttl: Lunin: “Good results are the most important thing”
arts.sum: It was important to win because we have to keep getting three points in every match. We have another important match in two days, we have to prepare for it and recover quickly”.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes' transfer demand to Man Utd chiefs as Real Madrid plot £90m move
arts.sum: Portugal international Bruno Fernandes and Manchester United may consider their options carefully should Real Madrid come in with a significant bid for the Red Devils' talismanic midfielder

arts.ttl: Report: Real Madrid plot record £90m move for Man United star after extensive scouting
arts.sum: Real Madrid have reportedly taken significant steps in their pursuit of Man United captain Bruno Fernandes, as they continue their aggressive approach towards signing top Premier League talent. Having already agreed personal terms with Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold, the Spanish giants are now setting their sights on Fernandes as part of their long-term midfield succession plan. arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Real Madrid 3-2 Leganes; 2025 La Liga
arts.sum: Played the pass to Arda that drew the penalty, scored a poacher’s goal to level the game, and was influential throughout. Kylian Mbappe scores a brace to help Madrid secure a nervy 3-2 victory.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold could snub Real Madrid and stay at Liverpool on one condition
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold could still decide to remain at Liverpool on one major condition according to former defender Stephen Warnock despite expectation England star will join Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Xabi Alonso to Real Madrid: Bayer Leverkusen boss addresses future as Carlo Ancelotti exit to Brazil rumoured
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen boss Xabi Alonso addresses his future amidst speculation that he will be leaving Germany to become the next Real Madrid manager.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 3 - 2 Leganes

arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Sunday's newspapers...
